title: Resolution Respectfully Returning Without Approval the Request of the Local Chief Executive with Regard to the Enactment of an Ordinance to Repeal Municipal Ordinance No. 2020-2044 Dated June 22, 2020: ?an Ordinance Approving the Grant of Hazard Pay to Veterinarians, Livestock/designated Meat Inspectors, Pound Keepers, Dog Catchers and Trained Municipal Vaccinators of the Office of the Municipal Agriculturist and the Municipal Slaughterhouse?.
